fields.subject: Naukri JobSpeak | March 2026
fields.body_html:
Use this link, if unable to view the page
index for march 2026
March'26 records a 9% rise in white-collar hiring, as FY'26 closes at +8%, the strongest job growth in three years
Strong +9% YOY growth witnessed in hiring, driven by AI/ML roles & non-IT sectors
Download Full Report
FY’26 has closed on a distinctly stronger note than last year, marked by the sustained resilience of non-IT sectors and tier II cities. What stood out in March was high-value talent in demand across the board; from freshers commanding premium salaries to AI/ML roles seeing sharpest traction at the 50+ LPA band. The foundation heading into FY'27 looks solid.
Dr. Pawan Goyal
Chief Business Officer, Naukri
Hiring trends by industries
Hiring trends
by experience level
Hiring trends by geography
Methodology
The Naukri JobSpeak is a monthly index that tracks trends in India's job market and hiring activity, based on new job postings (including free job listings*) and recruiter searches on Naukri.com's resume database. Using July 2008 as the base month (Index = 1,000), the index analyses hiring patterns across industries, cities, and experience levels. It aggregates data from over 150,000 clients, covering 80 lakh+ new job mandates annually.
Following the inclusion of free listings, hiring activity is witnessing a transient uplift due to higher participation from small and medium businesses, which is expected to normalise once the base adjusts over the next few months. The index excludes gig employment, hyperlocal hiring, and campus placements.
About Naukri
Naukri, pioneering e-recruitment in India since 1997, is the country's leading job site and Info Edge's flagship brand. As the first internet company to be listed in India, Info Edge through Naukri has maintained the highest market share and brand awareness among both job seekers and recruiters for over two decades. The platform has consistently outperformed competitors, making it synonymous with online job search in India.
Download Full Report

fields.subject: Cursor just got a lot bigger
fields.body_text:
### WELCOME

Happy Tuesday, legends. Welcome back to another edition of The Frontier — our weekly newsletter covering the best new AI launches on Product Hunt. . 

———————————————————————————

----------
### TOP LAUNCHES

# **Cursor got a lot bigger**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/0e1bf5c4-8099-4f2e-8c9d-50409e8108a4/Screenshot_2026-04-03_at_11.05.30.png?t=1775581797)
Follow image link: (https://Remodex is an open-source iPhone remote for Codex running on your Mac. Pair once with a QR code, then create threads, run subagents, use skills, do git actions, and steer active runs from your phone, with end-to-end encrypted sessions and optional self-hosting.)
Caption: 

* **[Cursor 3](https://www.producthunt.com/products/cursor-3)** is Cursor’s new update for people already deep in agent workflows. It pulls local agents, cloud agents, MCP tools, diffs, PRs, and even an integrated browser into one workspace, so you can run work across repos and keep the whole setup from spilling into five different places.



* **[Gerri](https://www.producthunt.com/products/gerri?launch=gerri)** reviews contracts against your company playbook, automatically accepts, rejects, or pushes back on the standard stuff, and routes anything outside the rules to the right person on the team. The pitch is pretty simple: fewer redline loops, less waiting around, and 90% of contracts reviewed in under 3 minutes.



* **[Flowith Canvas](https://www.producthunt.com/products/flowith/launches/flowith-canvas)** gives AI work a visual workspace instead of one long thread. You can drop prompts, notes, outputs, and references onto a canvas, branch things out, and keep the useful bits in view instead of buried in scrollback.



* **[Mngr](https://www.producthunt.com/products/imbue-7/launches/mngr-2)** is Imbue’s open-source command-line tool for running Claude, Codex, and other agent processes in parallel across local machines, Docker, Modal, or anything you can SSH into. It gives each run its own sandbox, lets you inspect transcripts and files, connect into stuck sessions, and aggregate the output without getting locked into one provider.



* **[Remodex](https://www.producthunt.com/products/remodex-codex-remote-control)** is an open-source iPhone remote for Codex running on your Mac. Pair once with a QR code, then create threads, run subagents, use skills, do git actions, and steer active runs from your phone, with end-to-end encrypted sessions and optional self-hosting.


----------———————————————————————————

----------
### FROM THE FORUMS

# No more Claude with OpenClaw

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3c47cf5f-626c-4845-834d-54caf0b02f0a/Screenshot_2026-04-07_at_18.15.00.png?t=1775582125)
Follow image link: (https://www.producthunt.com/p/claude/running-openclaw-with-claude-subs-is-dead-now-what)
Caption: 

Fmerian kicked off a thread after a pretty blunt change: Claude subscriptions no longer cover usage inside third-party tools like OpenClaw. So if you were running agents off a Claude sub, that setup is basically done.

The real question behind the post is not just what to switch to, it is what this does to the whole agent stack. Do you pay extra for proper API usage, switch models entirely, or move to alternatives like KiloClaw or self-hosted setups. The early vibe is people leaning away from the “cheap hack” phase and toward something more deliberate.

Read the rest (https://www.producthunt.com/p/claude/running-openclaw-with-claude-subs-is-dead-now-what)


--------------------
### WHAT’S HOT 

# **[First launch? We made a day for that](https://www.producthunt.com/posts/new?ref=header&utm_campaign=49530_2026-04-07&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_source=Daily+Digest&utm_term=editorial)**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/cbf2557e-2af2-48f5-b9a2-3a0631e8544d/Screenshot_2026-04-07_at_11.56.15.png?t=1775582197)
Follow image link: (https://www.producthunt.com/posts/new?ref=header)
Caption: 

This Thursday is **Alpha Day** on Product Hunt.

It’s for products launching for the **first time**. Not relaunched. Not already out in the wild. Proper first swing.

Alpha launches get their own **PH Alpha Day leaderboard** and a boost to their points, so brand-new products have a better shot at getting seen before the usual suspects take over. We’re also turning up the incentive to actually be useful: comments will matter more, and makers who jump in and leave thoughtful comments on other Alpha launches can earn more points too.

So if you’ve been building quietly and waiting for the right moment to put it in front of people, this is a pretty good one.

Get it in by **tomorrow midnight PST** to be part of Thursday’s Alpha Day.

Schedule your launch (https://www.producthunt.com/posts/new?ref=header)


----------
———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://deeperlearning.producthunt.com/p/cursor-just-got-a-lot-bigger

fields.subject: Here’s every keyword your competitors rank for that you don’t know about
fields.body_text:
This report is basically a free content roadmap.

Here’s something that might bother you.

Right now, your competitors are ranking for high-value keywords that aren’t even on your radar. Keywords with real

search volume, real buying intent, and real traffic are going straight to them instead of you.

Not because their content is better. But because they found those keywords first, and you didn’t know they existed.

The fastest way to close that gap is a keyword gap analysis. It shows you every keyword your competitor ranks for

that you don’t. And it turns out, there are usually hundreds of them.

Try this right now:

- Go to your Ubersuggest dashboard (https://email.ubersuggest.com/e3t/Ctc/DO+113/d305Lb04/VWH_Nj8WmFyCW4891_r9dlXnVW63xJzN5MyqR8N2jjSw85m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3lvW3WwXSr1QDPzvW6ZqR017QcL0lW589x6s2m9f5jW24NmJh3_BMP9W4syv7f5dmRprW6DTq1B4PDFcQW466RcJ1zYMYdW3_JwQr6-91pJW3xcxrD8Qngn1W4njtv01ZJ9LDW3gXlXT2vWQmvW4X9_KK2DmTGPW8vWVKn8lvMbzW4ZV9DS7NsBFpW2S0lvl430XgZW1-4MrS3BVVGQW4VgKSb9k8pQlW4N0S-R5_r7CZW8jSh_H2lskYwW3YPzX199bNtfW4MJWvv8Hgm8mW2kxShc4t6nY_W8HGNM86xrT2ZW6DJDDd87jj_PW3S_w441TYZzlW3Yn9qx5k_BPhW7dLlvl7cs8MrW7PWY0b6ThmkNW42FSk811SFCFVHWbvr4bB2fpW31JZ0J6DTCYSW7jDb652LcRrNf6rWCFH04 ) .
- Click on the Keyword Gap under Competitive Analysis.
- Enter your biggest competitor’s domain and run the report.

The list you get back is essentially your content roadmap for the next three months. These are proven keywords that

fields.body_html:
This report is basically a free content roadmap.

 

Here’s something that might bother you.

 

Right now, your competitors are ranking for high-value keywords that aren’t even on your radar. Keywords with real
search volume, real buying intent, and real traffic are going straight to them instead of you.

 

Not because their content is better. But because they found those keywords first, and you didn’t know they existed.

 

The fastest way to close that gap is a keyword gap analysis. It shows you every keyword your competitor ranks for
that you don’t. And it turns out, there are usually hundreds of them.

 

Try this right now:

  • Go to your Ubersuggest dashboard.
  • Click on the Keyword Gap under Competitive Analysis.
  • Enter your biggest competitor’s domain and run the report.

The list you get back is essentially your content roadmap for the next three months. These are proven keywords that
already drive traffic in your space; you just need to create content for them.

 

I run this report for my own sites every quarter. Every time, I find opportunities I completely missed.

 

Find your missing keywords right here →

 

And if you haven’t, make sure you take advantage of our lifetime offer while it lasts. You’ll be able to track more
competitors and get notifications when your competition is doing something that you should replicate.

Neil Patel

fields.subject: Inflation went up. Did your salary?
fields.body_html:
AmbitionBox
Hi Soft,
You know that feeling when your manager says "we'll see" - and you spend the next three weeks calculating everything in your head?
Yeah. It's that season again.
Every April, millions of people across India go through the same thing — the waiting, the hoping, the quiet Googling of "is my salary fair?" at 11pm.
I built AmbitionBox because I wanted those questions to have real answers. Not guesses. Not vague advice. But actual data from people doing your job, in your city, at your level.
Right now, our communities are buzzing with honest conversations like:
  • Stuck in a Salary Rut: Need Pro Tips!
  • Is 30 LPA too much for 6 YOE?
Real people. Real numbers. Real feels.
Running AmbitionBox showed me patterns most people never get to see. Here are 2 of them.
#1. A 10% hike on a low salary is worth less than a 5% hike on a fair one. Most people fight for the percentage. The smarter move is to first fix the base. → Am I paid fairly?
#2. Your hike percentage means nothing if you don't know what it translates to. Before you accept that number, see exactly what lands in your account every month. → Know my take-home
Whatever the number is this April, you deserve to know what it means.
Rooting for you,
Mayur Mundada,
Founder, AmbitionBox
P.S.: If you got a great hike this year, share your salary here on AmbitionBox. You'll be someone else's 11 pm answer. 🙏

fields.subject: Updates to how privacy settings work on Play
fields.body_text:
Hello Soft,

We’ve updated settings that manage personalization and activity history on  
Play. You’ll have dedicated controls for personalization on Play and for  
saving activity in your Google Account’s Play History, and these settings  
will be easily accessible in the Google Play menu.

In the past, personalization and history on Play were managed by Web & App  
Activity (WAA) settings in your Google Account. Going forward, WAA will no  
longer control Play personalization and Play History. Instead, you’ll be  
able to manage those settings directly on Play, and you’ll see this change  
in your account in the next few days. Learn more about Play personalization  
and Play History  
<http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

When the transition happens for your account, your Play settings will be  
based on the most recent choice you made in WAA, so your experience will  
stay the same. If you have WAA turned on during the transition, which is  
happening over the next few days, then your Play personalization and Play  
History settings will be on, and if WAA is off, then Play personalization  
and Play History will be off. As before, you’ll be able to choose how long  
your activity is saved in your Play History and if you want to delete it  
from Play History manually or automatically.

After the transition is complete, WAA and Play settings will be separate,  
and changes to one will no longer affect the other. You can view and change  
your Play privacy settings in Personalization in Play  
<https://myactivity.google.com/product/google_play/personalization> at any  
time. Learn more about the transition and how it affects your settings  
<http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

Thanks for using Google Play!

Should you have any questions please visit our Help Center  
<https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5oRRq0eA50bEW-9D6N8upfeW0HxV9wA8lODs7ab7yXcEGdX4w9LZlb2nqrA_AOfq5sTY9uOrLIo_xwFMd0jwS-ZJjgn5mC31z45ySqgAxrUqqKmZffjVnKgDTHP0n98QE9pfdosCDug9oLl6zGrTWp1YmCRbF08dSqMA7Xh5VNswNToSKdgkyO_7XMQQBZfbSS8OD-Pq1ZDTswBPvMSZhz0fTytvSaU8B9Cuqv7IWUnQpnDg9wizn3gEdkfy8s19Tz4>  
or get in touch  
<https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5ppRjSyPEnzO-QKibVlGE7VlQnOpxw-BlC0rQ5RFGPruxzVOep0mY6k5PZGJtQZw5w_MzhxnoTKwfDhzX-oDXDtjuShn1EldBJkXI3-ys2a41YodB0UXVbY_V1G4hq9PGv9I2iNjQ-mgDIpPPpC9LzqIX5KmMzPgceOJhZncoAmd2wWyr1lwTjIiP7HRueIo8GA02qPiQAJDRdUCrqh0h8gFje2Ga3nZFtMLCCzlij7WNdoYEDQ94BfFIAh>.

(c) 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

You have received this mandatory email service announcement to update you  
about important changes to your Play product or account.

Please do not reply to this email, as we are unable to respond from this  
email address. If you need support, please visit the Google Play Help  
Center <https://support.google.com/googleplay>.

fields.subject: Welcome to Gemini
fields.body_text:
Meet Gemini, your new AI assistant

With Gemini on your Android device, you can get help writing, learning,  
creating, and getting more done—even complex tasks. Go hands-free and have  
a natural, free-flowing voice conversation with Gemini Live1 to brainstorm  
ideas or talk things out. Learn  
more<https://support.google.com/bard?p=awb_opt_in&hl=en> about what you can  
do with Gemini.

How Gemini handles data and works with other services

Gemini uses info from your device to help you

Gemini uses this info to provide more customized and context-aware help.  
For example, Gemini accesses certain system permissions and data, like call  
and message logs, and your contacts (to help you keep in touch by sending  
messages or calling). Gemini can also read information including screen  
content, page context, and links, and off-screen context (to help you act  
on it).


Gemini works with other services

Gemini can respond with real-time info from other services, like Google  
Maps and Flights. You can also choose to connect services like Google  
Workspace and YouTube Music. If Gemini finds a connected app that can help,  
it will send information from your conversation and other relevant  
information to that connected app to help it generate a better response.  
You can manage your app settings.2 Learn  
more<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13695044?visit_id=638633132691845063-1690936925&p=faq_extensions&rd=1&hl=en>.


Things to know when speaking to Gemini

If “Hey Google” & Voice  
Match<https://support.google.com/bard?p=gemini_app_vm&hl=en> are on in  
Settings, you can talk to Gemini hands-free. Gemini may activate when you  
didn’t intend it to, for example, if it detects a noise like “Hey Google,”  
or if you accidentally activate it by touch. If Gemini responds, it will  
treat your input like a normal activation.

Gemini responses on lock screen

Gemini helps you with answers and actions even when your device is locked.  
Gemini will still require you to unlock for some actions, for example, when  
responses contain your personal content from apps (such as calendar  
events). You can change your Gemini on lock screen settings. Learn  
more<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/14576209?hl=en>.

Gemini activity and your choices

Your chats, what you share with Gemini (like files, videos, screens, and  
photos), audio, transcripts, and recordings of your Gemini Live  
interactions, your feedback, info from websites you visit with Gemini,  
product usage, and location info<https://g.co/privacypolicy/location> are  
saved in Gemini Apps  
Activity<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini?pli=1> (if your Keep  
Activity setting is on). This data is reviewed by trained service providers  
and used to improve Google services (including Gemini  
models<https://deepmind.google/models/gemini/> and other generative AI  
models). It’s also used to personalize your  
experience<https://support.google.com/gemini?p=gaa_on_personalization&hl=en>,  
depending on your settings and region. When Google uses your activity to  
improve its services, it gets help from human reviewers. To protect your  
privacy, chats are disconnected from your account before being sent to  
service providers for review. You can turn off Keep  
Activity<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini?utm_source=gemini>  
anytime. Be sure not to include info you wouldn’t want reviewed or used.
   	Note: Google Terms<https://policies.google.com/terms> apply to Gemini  
Apps<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961?hl=en&#privacy_notice&zippy=%2Cwhat-are-gemini-apps>.  
Google will process your data as described in the Google Privacy  
Policy<https://policies.google.com/privacy> and the Gemini Apps Privacy  
Notice<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961?hl=en&#privacy_notice&zippy=%2Cwhat-are-gemini-apps>.  
Gemini can make mistakes, including about people, so double-check  
it<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/14143489?hl=en>.

© 2025 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

1 Check responses for accuracy. Compatible with certain features and  
accounts. Internet connection required. Available in select countries,  
languages, and to users 18+.

2 Features may differ depending on subscription and results may vary. Some  
apps require setup. Country availability may vary. Check responses for  
accuracy.

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Gemini.

To protect your privacy, chats are disconnected from your account before being

Level up with the Gemini app
in Pro

Whether you're working on creative ideas, changing careers, or applying to  
college, your personal AI assistant is ready to help. The Gemini app in Pro  
¹ unlocks new and powerful AI features so you can tackle complex tasks and  
projects with ease. Here's a guide to get you started.


Try it now


A Gemini app search bar is shown animating between multiple different  
prompts. A Gemini app search bar is shown animating between multiple  
different prompts.




Video generation in the
Gemini app

Creating videos with the Gemini app in Pro is simple: just describe the  
scene you want to create — whether it's a short story, a visual concept, or  
a specific scene — and Gemini will bring your ideas to life with Veo 3.1.


Try it now


Do more in less time with Deep Research

Deep Research ² is your personal research assistant, here to help you get  
up to speed on any topic by transforming your prompt into a detailed  
research plan. Automatically browse hundreds of sites and create  
comprehensive reports with richer insights in minutes.


Try it now


Generate stunning images in seconds


Create your own


Create an image of an enchanted castle set in the future.


Try it now


Better prompts, better results

The Gemini app in Pro can handle highly complex prompts, so the more  
details you provide, the better your results.



Can you help create an advanced-level study guide about structure and  
bonding theories (covalent, ionic) in the form of multiple choice?


Try it now


I'm a writer, but I want to open a bakery. Help me create a plan to change  
careers within six months.


Try it now


4 min read

Want more ways to use Google's next-gen AI?

Discover how Gemini helps you get tasks done faster and go deeper on  
specific topics.

Read article ›





Have questions?

Visit the Help Center ›




Was this email helpful?




Happy

Neutral

Sad




1

2


Google AI Pro plan subscription and internet required. The Gemini app in  
Pro is available for ages 18+. Availability may vary by device, country,  
and language. Results for illustrative purposes and search time and sources  
vary by query. Check responses for accuracy.

that you'd like to receive information on the latest news and features for  
Google One. If you do not wish to receive these emails, please unsubscribe

fields.subject: You’re now using Gemini on web
fields.body_text:
Get the most out of Gemini on web

Welcome to Gemini, an AI assistant from Google that can help you  
supercharge your creativity and productivity. With the Gemini web app, you  
can get help writing, creating, learning, and more at  
gemini.google.com<https://gemini.google.com>. Learn  
more<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13275745?hl=en> about what  
you can do with Gemini on the web.

How Gemini handles data and works with other services

Gemini activity and your choices

Your chats, what you share with Gemini (like files, videos, screens, and  
photos), audio, transcripts, and recordings of your Gemini Live  
interactions, your feedback, info from websites you visit with Gemini,  
product usage, and location info<https://g.co/privacypolicy/location> are  
saved in Gemini Apps Activity<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini>  
(if your Keep Activity setting is on). This data is reviewed by trained  
service providers and used to improve Google services (including Gemini  
models<https://deepmind.google/technologies/gemini/> and other generative  
AI models). It’s also used to personalize your  
experience<https://support.google.com/gemini?p=gaa_on_personalization&hl=en>,  
depending on your settings and region. When Google uses your activity to  
improve its services, it gets help from human reviewers. To protect your  
privacy, chats are disconnected from your account before being sent to  
service providers for review. You can turn off Keep  
Activity<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini?utm_source=gemini>  
anytime. Be sure not to include info you wouldn’t want reviewed or used.

Gemini works with other services

Gemini can respond with real-time info from other tools, apps, and services  
like Google Maps and YouTube. You can also choose to connect services like  
Google Workspace and YouTube Music. If Gemini finds a connected app that  
can help, it will send information from your conversation and other  
relevant information to that connected app to help it generate a better  
response. You can manage your apps in your settings. Learn  
more<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13695044?hl=en&visit_id=638633132691845063-1690936925&p=faq_extensions&rd=1>.

Things to know

You can  
request<https://support.google.com/gemini?p=gemini_pntos_removal_request&hl=en>  
the removal of content under our policies or applicable laws. You can also  
export<https://takeout.google.com/> your information. Don’t rely on  
responses from Gemini as medical, legal, financial, or other professional  
advice. Your  
feedback<https://support.google.com/gemini?p=give_feedback&hl=en> will help  
make Gemini better.

Note: Google Terms of Service<https://policies.google.com/terms> and the  
Generative AI Prohibited Use  
Policy<https://policies.google.com/terms/generative-ai/use-policy> apply to  
Gemini  
Apps<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961#privacy_notice&zippy=%2Cwhat-are-gemini-apps?hl=en>.  
Google will process your data as described in the Google Privacy  
Policy<https://policies.google.com/privacy> and the Gemini Apps Privacy  
Notice<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961#privacy_notice?hl=en>.  
Gemini can make mistakes, including about people, so double-check  
it<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/14143489?hl=en>.

© 2025 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Gemini.

fields.body_html:
Welcome to Google Antigravity

Welcome to Google Antigravity!

Unlock the full potential of your workflow and experience liftoff.

Here are 3 ways to start elevating your development with Antigravity:

Build with Browser

Antigravity is deeply integrated with Chrome, allowing our agent to seamlessly act as your partner across your workflow. From the editor to the terminal to the browser, Antigravity is with you every step of the way.

Learn more →

Manage your agents

Tackle multiple tasks in parallel and monitor them all from one simplified management view. Interface with all your workstreams from a single command center, keeping you in the loop while freeing you to focus on the next challenge.

Learn more →

Develop without distraction

Stay in flowstate without ever leaving the editor. With intelligent tab completion, an integrated agent, and a host of powerful tools, productivity is at an all time high.

Launch Google Antigravity and experience liftoff.

Visit our docs to learn more about the product, our models, and features. →

As a reminder, don’t submit sensitive or personal information to Google Antigravity.

To help with quality, safety, and to improve our products, human reviewers may read, annotate, and process that data. Google takes steps to protect your privacy as part of this process, including disconnecting the data from your Google Account or API key before reviewers review or annotate it. Learn more about data use.

© 2025 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
